chapter_title.en: Chapter 15 – The sneezing and the Naming (of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/559)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/559)
text: إِذَا عَطَسَ الرَّجُلُ ثَلَاثاً فَسَمِّتْهُ ثُمَّ اتْرُكْهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhassin Bin Ahmad, from Aban Bin usman, from Zurara,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When a man sneezes three (times), so Name (Allah<sup>azwj</sup> in response) and leave him (if he sneezes any more)’.
en.sarwar: 27. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhsin ibn Ahmad from Aban ibn ‘Uthman from Zurara from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “If one sneezes three times, the special expressions for this purpose should be said only up to three times and thereafter should be left alone.”
